title: RobloxSafechat
description: Adds Roblox's Safechat menu from 2007-2014 into Minecraft's chat menu!
body:
## Minecraft Safechat *Today we answer a question nobody ever asked for an answer to...* Remember Roblox's old safechat feature from 2007-2014? **What if it was in Minecraft?** Well, with this mod, wonder no more! This mod adds every single one of Roblox's old safechat texts into Minecraft, plus some extras!
Is it too big or too small? Don't want messages to auto-send? Or want to configure something else? Look no further than the configuration menu! Or maybe you want to change the messages you can chat with?! Then you would go to the [messages file!](https://github.com/imthosea/RobloxSafechat/wiki/Message-file)
### Also check out the [wiki](https://github.com/ItsThosea/RobloxSafechat/wiki)! Programming and docs written by [Thosea](https://github.com/imthosea/). Idea, icons and default messages done by [Tiny Games](https://github.com/TinyGamesCoding/), who has also made other ports of safechat, like a [Chrome extension!](https://github.com/TinyGamesCoding/Roblox-Safechat-Extension)
